response.justification: While the candidate possesses extensive senior-level software development experience, including some work with embedded systems and C/C++, they do not meet several critical requirements for this role. Specifically, there is no indication of native-level Japanese proficiency, deep experience in embedded network security features for LAN-switch products, or direct experience with Linux kernel investigation and modification, which are all essential.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software development experience across diverse platforms.
Demonstrated proficiency in C/C++ and other programming languages.
Proven experience in building development environments and CI/CD pipelines.
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, a mandatory requirement.
Lack of specialized experience in embedded network security for LAN-switch products.
No explicit experience investigating or modifying the Linux kernel source code.
